ddls:
CREATE TABLE "exams" (
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course for which the exam is scheduled */,
  "exam_date" TEXT /* Date of the exam */,
  "exam_time" TEXT /* Time of the exam */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the exam will be held */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the exam in minutes */,
  "proctor" TEXT /* Person supervising the exam */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students that can take the exam in the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exam_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department the student is enrolled in */,
  "semester" INTEGER /* Current semester of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course in which the student is enrolled */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, dropped, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "minor_grade" INTEGER /* Grade obtained in the minor component */,
  "major_grade" INTEGER /* Grade obtained in the major component */,
  "final_grade" INTEGER /* Final grade for the course */,
  "exam_date" TEXT /* Date of the exam */,
  "exam_time" TEXT /* Time of the exam */,
  "grade_point" REAL /* Grade point equivalent of the final grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the head of the department */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the head of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (comma-separated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
column_names: Reference to the course for which the exam is scheduled

Maximum number of students that can take the exam in the venue

Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, dropped, completed)

Grade obtained in the major component
